item.name: Grilled Octopus
item.description: Charred over the wood grill, dressed with extra virgin olive oil, lemon, and Greek oregano.

item.name: Saganaki
item.description: Kefalotyri cheese flamed tableside with a squeeze of lemon.

item.name: Dolmades
item.description: Grape leaves stuffed with rice, herbs, and pine nuts, served at room temperature.

item.name: Spanakopita
item.description: Layered phyllo with spinach and feta, baked to order.

item.name: Horiatiki
item.description: Traditional village salad with tomato, cucumber, red onion, Kalamata olives, and a block of feta.

item.name: Lamb Souvlaki Plate
item.description: Skewers of marinated lamb grilled over charcoal, served with rice pilaf and grilled pita.

item.name: Moussaka
item.description: Layers of eggplant, spiced ground lamb, and bechamel, baked in the house tradition.

item.name: Grilled Branzino
item.description: Whole Mediterranean sea bass, grilled and finished with lemon and Aegean sea salt.

item.name: Pastitsio
item.description: Baked pasta with seasoned ground meat and a golden bechamel top.

item.name: Baklava
item.description: Layered phyllo with walnuts and Greek thyme honey.

item.name: Loukoumades
item.description: Fresh honey puffs fried to order, dusted with cinnamon.

item.name: Assyrtiko (glass)
item.description: Crisp, mineral white from the volcanic island of Santorini.

item.name: Agiorgitiko (glass)
item.description: Soft, food friendly red from the Nemea region.

item.name: Greek Coffee (metrio)
item.description: Prepared in the briki, medium sweet, served with a glass of water.

fastingMenu.note: Vegan leaning specials shift toward seafood and vegetables during fasting weeks.

item.name: Gigantes Plaki
item.description: Giant white beans baked in a tomato and herb sauce.

item.name: Grilled Sardines
item.description: Fresh sardines grilled simply with lemon and oil.
